title: epidendrum neglectum
intro: Epidendrum neglectum, commonly known as the 'Neglectum Orchid', is a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Epidendrum neglectum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea infusions, tinctures, and essential oil form to harness its medicinal properties.
